prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 94.1 kg; Height 174.5 cm; BMI 30.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.0%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 194mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 98.3kg; 9 months ago 94.1kg; 6 months ago 91.2kg; 3 months ago 91.2kg; current 94.1kg), Height (12 months ago 174.5cm; 9 months ago 174.5cm; 6 months ago 174.5cm; 3 months ago 174.5cm; current 174.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 151mg/g; 9 months ago 206mg/g; 6 months ago 154mg/g; 3 months ago 143mg/g; current 179mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 112mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 127mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
